ast.name: description
ast.source: Search through memos using natural language. Uses semantic similarity combined with exact text matching. Best for finding memos about a topic, concept, or theme.
ast.target: 使用自然语言搜索备忘录。结合语义相似度与精确文本匹配。最适合查找关于某个主题、概念或主题的备忘录。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 返回的最大结果数（默认10，最多20）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Filter memos by structured criteria: tags, date ranges, and memo type. Use when the user asks about specific tags, time periods, or task status.
ast.target: 按结构化条件筛选备忘录：标签、日期范围和备忘录类型。当用户询问特定标签、时间段或任务状态时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieve a specific memo by its ID. Use when you need the full content of a memo referenced in search results.
ast.target: 通过ID检索特定备忘录。当您需要搜索结果的完整内容时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Find memos that are linked to, reference, or comment on a given memo.
ast.target: 查找与给定备忘录链接、引用或评论的备忘录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The memo ID to find relations for

ast.name: description
ast.source: Generate an image from a text description. Use when the user explicitly requests an image, illustration, or visual. Returns the generated image.
ast.target: 根据文本描述生成图像。当用户明确请求图像、插图或视觉内容时使用。返回生成的图像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Detailed description of the image to generate
ast.target: 要生成的图像的详细描述

ast.name: description
ast.source: Summarize a long piece of text concisely. Use when you need to condense large amounts of retrieved memo content before presenting it.
ast.target: 简洁地总结一段长文本。当你需要压缩大量检索到的备忘录内容后再呈现时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fetch and summarize a web page. Use when the user provides a URL and wants its content summarized.
ast.target: 获取并总结一个网页。当用户提供URL并希望总结其内容时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL of the web page to summarize

ast.name: description

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ Security Note: Longer expiration times increase security risk. Only use extended periods if necessary.
ast.target: ⚠️ 安全提示：更长的过期时间会增加安全风险。仅在必要时使用延长期限。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The Thino HTTP API allows you to interact with your thinos programmatically. All endpoints require authentication using a Bearer token.
ast.target: Thino HTTP API 允许您以编程方式与您的 thino 进行交互。所有端点都需要使用 Bearer 令牌进行身份验证。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All API requests require a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Generate a token using the "Generate Token" button above.
ast.target: 所有 API 请求都需要在 Authorization 标头中提供 Bearer 令牌。请使用上方的“生成令牌”按钮生成一个令牌。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All API responses return JSON in the following format:
ast.target: 所有 API 响应均以 JSON 格式返回，格式如下：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 401 未授权 - 缺少或无效的令牌

ast.name: text
ast.target: 403 禁止访问 - 需要专业版许可证

ast.name: text
ast.target: 404 未找到 - 端点不存在

ast.name: text
ast.source: 405 Method Not Allowed - Wrong HTTP method
ast.target: 405 方法不允许 - HTTP 方法错误

ast.name: text
ast.source: 413 Request Too Large - Request body too large
ast.target: 413 请求过大 - 请求体过大

ast.name: text
ast.source: 429 Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded
ast.target: 429 请求过多 - 超出速率限制

ast.name: title
ast.source: Refresh to check for new memos

ast.name: title

regex.source: description:`Search through memos using natural language. Uses semantic similarity combined with exact text matching. Best for finding memos about a topic, concept, or theme.`
